zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Ham於1681年1月29日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福時，她的父親John Ham32歲，母親Mary Heard32歲。她於1714年與Jeremiah Rollins在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1768年6月在她的家鄉享年87歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德洛林斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Ham于1681年1月29日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福时，她的父亲John Ham32岁，母亲Mary Heard32岁。她于1714年与Jeremiah Rollins在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1768年6月在她的家乡享年87岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德洛林斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Ham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Ok, Nam, Chul, Eun Hee, Eun Young, Hae Jung, Il Hwa.
English (mainly southwestern) and German: variant of   Hamm  .
Dutch: topographic name from ham ‘land in a river bend’, ‘enclosed meadow’, or a habitational name from any of several country houses and places called De(n) Ham. Compare Van Ham and Vanderham .

variants.name: Hamme
meanings: Flemish (Van Hamme): variant of Ham 2, particularly referring to Hamme, a place in East Flanders.
German and English: variant of   Hamm  .

variants.name: Hamm
meanings: English (London): topographic name for someone who lived at a place called from Middle English ham(me), hom(me) (Old English hamm), which meant ‘land in a river bend’, ‘land hemmed in by marshland’, ‘wet land hemmed in by higher ground’, ‘river meadow’, or ‘cultivated plot on the edge of woodland or moor’. The topographic term is found mainly in the South Midlands and southern England. There are many farmsteads with this name in Devon and Sussex, five more substantial settlements called Ham or Hamp in Somerset, as well as East and West Ham in Essex, and places called Ham in Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Surrey, and Wiltshire. This form of the surname is also comparatively frequent in Ireland.
German: topographic name for someone who lived on land in a river bend, Old High German ham (see 1 above).
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of numerous places called Hamm, mainly the city in Westphalia.

variants.name: Hahm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Sung, Yong, Byung, Chang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jee, Jong, Jong Hun, Jong Hyun, Moon Hee, Jung Suk, Sang, Seok, Seung, Soon, Sungtae, Taeyong.
German: metonymic occupational name for a sealer of weights and measures, from Middle High German hāme ‘(standard) measure’.

variants.name: Hams
meanings: English: variant of Ham with plural -s or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Ham was born on 29 January 1681, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, her father, John Ham, was 32 and her mother, Mary Heard, was 32. She married Jeremiah Rollins in 1714, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died in June 1768, in her hometown, at the age of 87, and was buried in Rollinsford, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Ham est née le 29 janvier 1681, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Ham, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mary Heard, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Jeremiah Rollins en 1714, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en juin 1768, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Rollinsford, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Ham am 29. Januar 1681 in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Ham 32 und ihre Mutter Mary Heard 32. Sie hat 1714 in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Jeremiah Rollins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb im Juni 1768 im Alter von 87 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Rollinsford, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ham è nata il il 29 gennaio 1681 nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Ham, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mary Heard, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Jeremiah Rollins nel 1714, nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1768, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolta a Rollinsford, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hamが1681年1月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーで生まれた時，父John Hamは32歳，母Mary Heardは32歳であった。1714年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーでJeremiah Rollinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1768年6月に故郷で87歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードロリンスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버

ko.Somersworth, Strafford, New Hampshire, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 서머스워스
ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Colonia: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.Dover MM, Strafford, New Hampshire, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ham(이)가 1681년 1월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Ham(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Heard(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1714년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 Jeremiah Rollins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1768년 6월 그녀의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 롤린스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ham nasceu em 29 de janeiro de 1681, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Ham, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mary Heard, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Jeremiah Rollins em 1714, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em junho de 1768, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos, e foi sepultada em Rollinsford, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Ham родилась 29 января 1681 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Ham было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Heard, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jeremiah Rollins в 1714 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла июнь 1768 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности роллинсфорд, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Ham nació el 29 de enero de 1681, en Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, John Ham, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mary Heard, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Jeremiah Rollins en 1714, en Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en junio de 1768, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultada en Rollinsford, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.
